completed.summary: Fix mute button overlapping tribe text: muteBtn at (10,10) with depth 20 was created after tribeText (12,10), covering characters 'Xi' of 'Xin-xi'. Moved tribeText x to 38, past the ~24px mute button emoji area. All 481 tests pass.

Fix city menu scroll offset inversion: showCityMenu() used '+ scrollX' instead of '- scrollX', causing menu to render off-screen when camera moved (text has setScrollFactor(0)). Also added camera auto-center on starting city — Imperius/Oumaji/Elyrion start positions were off the 800px viewport, blocking unit training. camera.setScroll(cityX-400, cityY-300) on game start. 481 tests pass.

Update GDD.md §3.5 (Cloak Infiltration: ❌ Not in code → [x] Implemented, commit a5f8eaa) and §8.4 (AI low-HP prioritization: ⚠️ no prioritization → [x] Low-HP sort, commit 9564cad). Documentation-only. No stale ❌ or ⚠️ markers remain in substantive sections. Only 4 remaining [ ] items are legitimately deferred scoring extensions (Territorial, Exploration, Monument, Temple) per GDD §1 note. 481 tests pass. Live site 200, 0 console errors.

Add Escape-key pause/resume overlay: semi-transparent 55% opacity backdrop dims canvas, centered 'PAUSED' text, 'Resume (ESC)' button. Pause blocked during AI turn (isAiRunning guard). togglePause() with idempotent pauseGame()/resumeGame(). 11 state-machine tests added. 492 total tests pass. Coach FIX: added !isPaused guards to all 12 input handlers (pointerdown, pointermove, end turn, tech, wait, convert, heal, submerge, emerge, infiltrate, enchant, mute) — player could interact with game elements through the pause overlay.

coach_review.notes: CYCLE: 2026-06-26 02:50 UTC. Player commit 2bae1cc (pause overlay) added visual overlay correctly (55% backdrop, PAUSED text, Resume button, 11 tests) but MISSED blocking input events during pause. All 12 input handlers lacked isPaused guards — player could click map, end turn, use abilities through the overlay. Coach added guards to: pointerdown, pointermove, endTurn button, tech button, wait/convert/heal/submerge/emerge/infiltrate/enchant buttons, mute button. 492 tests pass. Live site 200, 0 console errors. Player still has fix-tribe-select-sorting pending — not started.
